DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-MS7-L1-BR300-MSSS7-ESC-EUR-01 • Grade 7 • MS Social Studies Grade 7 • Medieval Europe

The Lord's Share

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: Where are the students?
2QUESTION 2: What does the lord get from the people on the scroll?
3QUESTION 3: What will the students probably do next?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Listen again. Say one thing the girl says and one thing the boy says out loud.
PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  HSS 7.6  |  MS Social Studies Grade 7 — Medieval Europe
